narrative:
Milton Twp township has 1,849 registered voters, with 49.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.8 percentage points.
